description:
Perform the Q1 2025 quarter-end close for Northwind Traders (January 1 to March 31, 2025). The books contain several errors that must be corrected before the period can be closed.

A $1,500.00 payment to 'City Services' on 2025-03-05 was incorrectly recorded under 'Office Supplies' — reclassify it to 'Professional Services'. A $35.00 bank service charge from 'First National Bank' on 2025-02-28 was never recorded — record it as a payment from Cash on Hand to 'Bank charges' with description 'Monthly service fee'. Record a single adjusting journal entry dated 2025-03-31 with narration 'Q1 2025 adjusting entries' containing four lines: debit Depreciation Expense $450.00, credit Accumulated Depreciation $450.00, debit Insurance Expense $600.00, credit Prepaid Insurance $600.00. Open the Aged Receivables report, identify the customer with the largest total outstanding balance, and set their credit limit to $1,000. After all corrections, set the Lock Date to 2025-03-31 and generate the Profit & Loss report for January 1 to March 31, 2025. Write the exact Net Profit figure to /home/ga/Documents/q1_pnl.txt.

Login: administrator (no password) at http://localhost:8080
